case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC vs. MEDEARIS, VICTOR et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RANEY, SONYA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDEARIS, VICTOR RANEY, SONYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1550 EDDY ST, #309, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94115 $1,682.10 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,223.10, LEASE FORFEITED
